blocks.text: The little white rabbit has a magical palette with a grid of n rows and m columns. Before starting to mix the colors, the little white rabbit will squeeze a kind of pigment to the left of each row, denoted by a1, a2,..., an, and also squeeze a kind of pigment above each column, denoted by b1, b2,..., bm.

There are a total of n × m kinds of selectable pigments, represented by integers 0, 1, 2,..., nm − 1 for different pigments. Then, in the cell of the i-th row and the j-th column, the little white rabbit will mix a color ci,j = ai bj mod nm using the pigment ai to the left of the i-th row and the pigment bj above the j-th column.
The little white rabbit hopes that each of the n × m cells has a different color, and you need to find out whether it can be achieved.

The first line of the input contains an integer T (1 ≤ T ≤ $10^{4}$ ), indicating the number of test cases. For each test case: The only line contains two integers n and m (1 ≤ n, m ≤ $10^{6}$, 1 ≤ n × m ≤ $10^{6}$ ), indicating the number of rows and the number of columns. It is guaranteed that the sum of n × m over all test cases does not exceed $10^{6}$.
For each test case, if no solution exists, output “No” (without quotes) in one line. Otherwise, output three lines:

items: The first line contains one string “Yes” (without quotes).
The second line contains n integers a1, a2,..., an (0 ≤ ai < nm).
The third line contains m integers b1, b2,..., bm (0 ≤ bi < nm).

blocks.text: For the first sample case, [c1,1, c1,2, c1,3, c2,1, c2,2, c2,3 ] = [1, 3, 5, 2, 0, 4], which are pairwise different.

小白兔有一块神奇的调色板，上面有一个n行m列的网格。在开始调色前，小白兔会在每一行的左侧挤出一种颜料，记作a1,a2,...,an，并且在每一列的上方挤出一种颜料，记作b1,b2,...,bm。一共有n×m种可用的颜料，用整数0,1,2,...,nm−1表示不同的颜料。然后在第i行和第j列的格子中，小白兔将使用第i行左侧的颜料ai和第j列上方的颜料bj混合出一种颜色ci,j=ai bj mod nm。小白兔希望n×m个格子里都是不同的颜色，你需要判断是否可行。
输入的第一行包含一个整数T (1≤T≤$10^{4}$)，表示测试数据的组数。对于每组测试数据：仅有的一行包含两个整数n和m (1≤n,m≤$10^{6}$,1≤n×m≤$10^{6}$)，表示行数和列数。保证所有测试数据n×m的总和不超过$10^{6}$。
对于每组测试数据，如果不存在可行方案，则在一行内输出“No”（不含引号）。否则，输出三行：

items: 第一行包含一个字符串“Yes”（不含引号）。
